auth.title: Noah Garden
auth.subtitle: Sign in with your phone to view invoices and make payments.
auth.errorNotFound: No account found with this phone number. Please contact the administrator.
auth.errorInvalid: Invalid or expired session. Please try again.
auth.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.openInTelegramSubtitle: This app only works inside Telegram. Open the link below in Telegram to continue.
auth.sharePhoneToContinue: Share your phone number to link your account.
auth.sharePhoneHint: Use the button below to share your phone number with the app.

invoices.title: My Invoices
invoices.settleInOffice: Please settle this case in person by visiting the office.

payment.title: Submit Payment
payment.helpText: After paying via bank transfer, upload a screenshot of the transaction confirmation.
payment.successMessage: Your payment is being reviewed. You'll be notified once it's confirmed.
